name: Growth Golf
address: 11550 W Meadows Dr Unit A-1, Littleton, CO 80127
about: Growth Golf operates Colorado's premiere indoor golf studios with locations in Broomfield and Littleton. The facility utilizes industry-leading TrackMan technology in climate-controlled bays, offering players the ability to practice, play, and receive coaching year-round. With PGA-trusted TrackMan launch monitors and Virtual Golf 3 simulator software, players can access detailed swing analytics and play on over 400 world-famous courses. The venue provides a mix of public bay rentals by the hour and membership options that include unlimited access, discounts on lessons, and priority booking for events and leagues.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to cutting-edge TrackMan technology with detailed swing analytics
Ability to play on 400+ world-famous courses in a climate-controlled environment
Professional coaching with instructors having 10+ years of experience

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
